scenario.name: UAC REGISTER (no auth)
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagREG[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;expires=300 Expires: 300 Content-Length: 0
